query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accum" computer science
rationale: This paper addresses the same core mechanism (LLM weight quantization and error mitigation) and domain (large language model deployment) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing foundational work on quantization error correction that is directly relevant to extending or comparing against the KVarN approach.
